content:
VESPRO™ LIVEESSENCE
Liquid Enzymes Concentrate
Pristine clear liquid concentrate containing enzymes and colloidal trace minerals

What is LiveEssence?

LiveEssence is a pristine clear liquid concentrate containing 37 types of colloidal aged & fermented nano digestive and metabolic enzymes from fruits, vegetables and starches. In addition, it also contains 78 types of Glacier water derived ionic trace minerals and 20 types of colloidal amino acids from plants.

Benefits of LiveEssence:

- For Poor Digestion: Regular enzyme capsules are expensive and not effective in solving indigestion problems. Only fermented and aged enzymes are bio active.
- For Toxic Blood: An extremely effective, 100% non herbal producing blood cleanser and alkalizing. A clean blood system produces clear skin complexion and less joint pain.
- For Skin Problems: Excellent for difficult skin problems such as acne, psoriasis, eczema and rashes.
- For Poor Energy: Provides ATP energy producing minerals and enzymes without causing heart palpitation and breathlessness.
- Vegetarian: Provides all crucial minerals/enzymes/amino acids that are lacking in a vegetarian diet. 100% vegetarian formula. No milk, egg or meat by-products are used.
- Increases Blood Conductivity: Improves transmission of nerves impulse. Good for older people.
- Diabetic Support: Contains all crucial minerals, enzymes & amino acids for regulating blood sugar and insulin sensitivity. Can be sprayed on diabetic sores.

37 Types Of Metabolic & Digestive Enzymes:

What are enzymes?

Enzymes are natural protein substances produced in our bodies. They start and regulate every single reaction & process in our cells. Enzymes exist both in humans, animals and plants. When a plant or tree lacks enzymes, they will stop sprouting flowers and will not bear any fruits. Even beer wine and cheese will fail to ferment successfully without enzymes. All the goodness of enzymes which you have read from anti ageing literature, clinical studies and anti ageing books refer to the TOTAL combination of digestive and metabolic enzymes. Both types of enzymes are produced naturally by the human body and need to work together for perfect health.

Digestive Enzymes:

All enzyme products available from retail or organic stores are digestive enzymes. Their sole purpose is to aid in the digestion of food. Our stomach and pancreas produce digestive enzymes too, however owing to poor health and the ageing process, lesser amounts are produced, unable to cope with the normal demand for good digestion.

Metabolic Enzymes - The Missing Link in Most Products:

Metabolic enzymes are totally different from digestive enzymes. They are produced exclusively by the liver to help all cells, organs, glands and blood attain peak functioning. Metabolic enzymes carry out a variety of cellular functions necessary for survival like digestion, cellular respiration, energy storage, transcription, and response to the environment. Metabolic enzymes are vital for growth and maintenance of cellular integrity.

You couldn't breathe, hold a cup steadily, turn a page in a book, read, taste the food or hear a telephone ring without metabolic enzymes. That's how important metabolic enzymes are! VesPro™ Live Essence contains 37 types of metabolic and digestive enzymes derived from the fermentation of vegetables and fruits for peak health. Production of metabolic enzymes requires very accurate laboratory control.

78 Types of Glacier Colloidal Trace Minerals:

"You can trace every sickness, every disease, every ailment to mineral deficiency." – Linus Pauling

Humans and animals are made of minerals. When one burns a human body what remains is ash. Ash is a basic combination of minerals.

Why are trace minerals so important?

Every living cell on this planet depends on trace minerals for proper function and structure. Trace minerals are needed for:
- Manufacturing of enzyme and hormones
- Blood, bone, nerve, muscle & energy building
- Detoxifying our bodies by drawing out toxins out of cells. Proper phase 1 and 2 liver detoxification
- Serving as a raw material for building antibodies
- Regulating acid/alkaline balance in blood and tissues
- Normalizing heartbeat & cardiac rhythms
- Regulating water balance in our bodies
- Proper digestion
- Acting as conductor for the body's electrical current

Symptoms of Trace Mineral Deficiencies:

Arm and leg numbness, brittle fingernails, eczema, fragile bones, headaches, head palpitations, hypertension, insomnia, irritability, muscle cramps, osteoporosis, periodontal disease, rickets, tooth decay, irregular heartbeat, slowed nerve impulse response, decreased muscle growth, aching joints, arthritis, increased serum cholesterol, impaired glucose tolerance, lack of energy, protein/calorie malnutrition, susceptibility to infection, lowered or escalated blood sugar levels, coronary artery disease, breathing difficulties, dry or falling-off hair, dizziness, anemia (pale skin, fatigue), constipation, sore or inflamed tongue, aching muscles, anxiety, confusion, decreased blood pressure and body temperature, disorientation, easily aroused anger, noise sensitivity, rapid pulse and sound sensitivity, muscle weakness, twitching, blood pressure problems, disruption in proper pH balance, increased risks of infection, poor resistance to bacterial infections, poor memory.

Why is VesPro Live Glacial Colloidal Trace Mineral the preferred source of organic minerals compared to 100% seawater or 100% fossilized plants?

1. Purity of Source: VesPro LiveEssence Glacier Colloidal Trace Mineral is the broadest spectrum mineral/trace mineral complex 'harvested' from the pristine virgin glaciers in the high elevation on pollution and nuclear free Mount Rainier, Washington, USA. Glaciers are rivers of very slow flowing, pure fresh snow in the mountains. It has one of the most natural and clean sources of minerals/trace minerals known to modern science compared to seawater and fossilized plants which contain visible heavy sedimentation.

2. State Of The Art Purification: Only VesPro LiveEssence Glacier Colloidal Mineral uses the state of the art "Molecular Distillation" purification process to ensure the highest level of purity compared to general filtering used on seawater/humid shale basal minerals. This guarantees the purest and safest organic mineral free from "heavy metal/chemical".

3. Superior Taste: VesPro LiveEssence Glacier Colloidal Mineral tastes less bitter. 100% fossilized plants derived minerals are very bitter and caustic. Hence most of them have to be highly diluted. However this reduces their efficacy.

4. Superior Texture: VesPro LiveEssence Glacier Colloidal Mineral does not easily form sediments in its container bottle compared to 100% seawater or 100% fossilized plants derived minerals.

5. Broadest Spectrum: 78 minerals and trace minerals including: Antimony, Argon, Barium, Beryllium, Bismuth, Boron, Bromine, Calcium, Carbon, Cerium, Cesium, Chlorine, Chromium, Cobalt, Copper, Dysprosium, Erbium, Europium, Fluoride, Gadolinium, Gallium, Germanium, Gold, Hafnium, Holmium, Iodine, Iridium, Iron, Lanthanum, Lithium, Lutetium, Magnesium, Manganese, Molybdenum, Nickel, Osmium, Palladium, Platinum, Phosphorus, Scandium, Selenium, Silica, Silver, Sulfur, Sodium, Strontium, Tantalum, Tellurium, Terbium, Thallium, Thorium, Tin, Titanium, Tungsten, Vanadium, Ytterbium, Yttrium, Zinc, Zirconium.

Questions & Answer:

How can you tell if your trace minerals contains true colloidal mineral or inferior synthetic minerals?
100% colloidal minerals without any adulteration is always clear and has absolutely no particles or precipitation even when refrigerated for 3 years. Put our competitor's product in the fridge, when precipitation forms in 24 hours, it's a clear proof of a poor quality synthetic product. LiveEssence is 100% pure and does not precipitate.

Only LiveEssence uses 100% pure glacier water with no dilution as its mineral source. LiveEssence is a pure concentrate and only 8-10 drops are required per serving.
